query:
SELECT 
  p.name AS project, p.priority, p.sector,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS sendReady,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'named_unverified' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS stillUnverified,
  SUM(CASE WHEN c.contactTrustTier = 'send_ready' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AS isActionable
FROM projects p
JOIN contacts c ON c.project = p.name
WHERE p.id IN (
  1350035, 1380005, 1380015, 1350021, 1350013,
  1350022, 1350006, 1350010, 1380001, 1350007,
  1350015, 1380002, 1350032, 1380028, 1350020,
  1350030, 1380013, 1290011, 1350004
)
GROUP BY p.id
ORDER BY p.priority ASC, sendReady DESC;
